title: May 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}
'''May 20''' is the 140th day of the year (141st in leap years). There are 225 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1982]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] is completed, with the final shot being from the [[speeder bike]] chase scene.
*[[1998]] – [[Crimson Empire 6|''Crimson Empire'' 6]] published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 41|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 41]] published.
*2009 – ''[[Star Wars: Vector Volume 2, Chapters 3 & 4]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' opens at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]] at Walt Disney World.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 5|''Star Wars'' (2015) 5]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 5|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 5]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales 1|''Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars'' – ''Battle Tales'' 1]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Volume 3 (Phase III)]]'' published.
<noinclude>
